features.name: Offboard position/velocity control
features.notes: Full PX4 uORB interface with NED/ENU frame conversion, multi-agent support

features.name: Attitude and thrust control
features.notes: PID-based stabilizing controller at 250 Hz via MAVROS

features.name: Multi-agent parametric launch
features.notes: Spawns per-vehicle nodes from vehicles.yaml config

features.name: PX4 position control abstraction
features.notes: Python port of PX4 position controller with PID, anti-windup, tilt limiting

features.name: Reusable offboard flight test harness
features.notes: Base class (FlightTestHarness) + velocity step A2. MAVROS-only, YAML-driven sequences, drift guard, bag recording.
